covenant_type.author: Reviewing Attorney
covenant_type.basis: corporate grantor conveying by quitclaim with covenant; title insurer accepts

grantor_capacity.author: Reviewing Attorney
grantor_capacity.basis: grantor is a Maine business corporation; conveys by authorized officer under 13-C M.R.S. § 302

legal_description: A certain lot or parcel of land with the buildings thereon, situated on the westerly side of Avery P. Poe, being Lot 9 as shown on a plan recorded in the York County Registry of Deeds in Book 210, Page 7.
